channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-19
item.description:
The open-source research community has seen significant activity across multiple projects. Notably, the `oddpub` project has released a new version (7.3.0) of its ontogenerator, complete with updated documentation and a Zenodo badge. Meanwhile, `statcheck` and `escicheck` have focused on administrative updates and synchronization with other repositories, respectively. The `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in its model picker, while `docpluck` and `regcheck` have addressed various bugs and issues, including text loss and display problems. These updates demonstrate the community's commitment to refining and expanding its tools, and we celebrate the progress made across these interconnected projects. By working together and sharing knowledge, the community continues to drive innovation and improvement in open-source research tools.

32 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
regcheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits
